sections_json.title: 人话版

sentences.text: 这篇论文在做什么：This paper presents the mAIEnergy dataset, an open-access, multimodal corpus developed to support Large Language Model (LLM) applications in the energy sector.
论文《A Multimodal Dataset for Large Language Model Applications in the Energy Domain》发表于 2026-07-13，作者 2 人，原文见 https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11459v1。

sections_json.body: 这篇论文在做什么：This paper presents the mAIEnergy dataset, an open-access, multimodal corpus developed to support Large Language Model (LLM) applications in the energy sector. 论文《A Multimodal Dataset for Large Language Model Applications in the Energy Domain》发表于 2026-07-13，作者 2 人，原文见 https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11459v1。

sections_json.title: 领域脉络

sentences.text: 本文主类目 eess.SY：系统与控制工程——让复杂系统按预期稳定运行。
交叉类目 cs.AI：人工智能——让机器完成需要智能的任务的总领域。

sections_json.title: 证据与数字

sentences.text: The dataset integrates approximately 50,000 textual documents, 20,000 images, 25 million numerical time series records, and 2 million geospatial and relational data entries.

意外收获：本文由 2 位作者合作完成，发表后 48 小时内即进入你的学习队列。
